bird.name: 巴拉旺孔雀雉
bird.summary: 巴拉旺孔雀雉（學名：Polyplectron napoleonis，以往稱為Polyplectron emphanum），又名巴拉望孔雀雉，是中等身形的雉。 特徵 巴拉旺孔雀雉是灰孔雀雉屬中最似孔雀的雉。雄鳥有直立的冠，眼睛上有白紋，身體呈金屬綠及黑色。尾羽有藍綠色的大眼斑點，…

locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

relations.subject: 巴拉旺孔雀雉
relations.evidence: Endemic to the Philippines, the Palawan peacock-pheasant is found in the humid forests of Palawan Island in the southern part of the Philippine archipelago

relations.subject: 巴拉旺孔雀雉

relations.subject: 巴拉旺孔雀雉
relations.evidence: The bird is also depicted in the official seal of the city of Puerto Princesa and is in the Philippine one hundred-peso note This species is threatened by habitat loss, the illegal wildlife trade and hunting and is listed as a Vulnerable species by the International Union for Conservation of Nature
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 巴拉旺孔雀雉
relations.evidence: The bird is also depicted in the official seal of the city of Puerto Princesa and is in the Philippine one hundred-peso note This species is threatened by habitat loss, the illegal wildlife trade and hunting and is listed as a Vulnerable species by the International Union for Conservation of Nature
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 巴拉旺孔雀雉
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size and limited range as well as hunting and capture for trade, the Palawan peacock-pheasant is classified as Vulnerable in the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

relations.subject: 巴拉旺孔雀雉
relations.evidence: Forest loss, due to legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmland and urban development, is its main threat
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
